title: Core Elements of Outpatient Antibiotic Stewardship | Antibiotic Prescribing and Use | CDC

Implementation resources 
Below are additional CDC and external resources that can support Core Elements implementation in outpatient settings. 
Leadership commitment 
Demonstrate dedication to and accountability for optimizing antibiotic prescribing and patient safety. 
A Commitment to Improving Antibiotic Use 
Action 
Implement at least one policy or practice to improve antibiotic prescribing, assess whether it is working, and modify as needed. 
Improving Outpatient Antibiotic Prescribing: A Toolkit for Healthcare Payers 
MITIGATE Antimicrobial Stewardship Toolkit 
Clinical Care of Outpatient Adult and Pediatric Populations 
Watchful Waiting for Ear Infections 
Delayed Prescribing Prescription Pads 
Symptom Relief Prescription Pads 
Antibiotic Stewardship for Oral Health | ADS - Association for Dental Safety 
Tracking and reporting 
Monitor antibiotic prescribing practices and offer regular feedback to clinicians, or have clinicians assess their own antibiotic prescribing practices.
Health departments 
Guide to Using Outpatient Antibiotic Prescription Data for Peer Comparison Audit & Feedback 
Antimicrobial Resistance & Patient Safety Portal: Antibiotic Use & Stewardship Data 
Example letter: Providing feedback to providers about number of antibiotics prescribed 
Health plans 
Fact Sheet: Improving outpatient antibiotic use through audit
